---
name: Improve AEON instruction
about: Suggest a correction or improvement to the agent instruction file
title: "[Improve]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What should change?

Describe the proposed change.

## Why?

Explain what agent failure this prevents or what developer benefit it adds.

## Universality check

- [ ] This is not specific to one company.
- [ ] This is not specific to one stack unless clearly marked as an example.
- [ ] This reduces risk, hallucination, bloat, or ambiguity.
- [ ] This keeps AEON practical and agent-actionable.
